overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a vibrant cyberpunk city street with towering neon-lit buildings, futuristic vehicles, and pedestrians. The scene features a mix of natural daylight and bright neon advertisements, creating a vivid, high-contrast atmosphere typical of game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon billboards and overhead industrial pipes

events.description: passing by pedestrians walking in the same direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and vibrant neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing casual futuristic clothing
purple taxi driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large pink neon advertisement sign mounted on the right wall
light blue temporary wall with graffiti and posters along the right sidewalk edge
multi-story building with balconies and large windows on the left side
large industrial pipes running horizontally across the street overhead
skyscraper with green-tinted glass facade visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic commercial sidewalk lined with towering buildings. A prominent pink neon sign reading 'WET DREAM' illuminates the right side, while industrial orange pipes run overhead. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and a purple taxi drives past on the left. The atmosphere is bright and vivid with mixed natural and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk

events.description: approaching the intersection as the sidewalk opens into a crosswalk area
beginning to turn left at the intersection, changing direction from forward to left

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection by turning left at the crosswalk while observing traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light mounted on a pole
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with visible crosswalk stripes and a red traffic light. The camera begins turning left, moving away from the blue construction barrier and neon signs. The beige commercial building now passes by closely on the left, while the tall glass tower remains visible straight ahead. A black sedan waits at the traffic light in the center of the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, neon-lit commercial corridor into a wide, open urban intersection. It begins by walking along a futuristic sidewalk beneath industrial orange pipes, where a prominent pink neon sign reading WET DREAM casts a vivid glow over pedestrians and a passing purple taxi. As the camera advances, the enclosed feeling of the towering buildings gives way to a broad crossing marked by white stripes and a red traffic light. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, moving away from blue construction barriers and neon signage to pass closely by a beige commercial building. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a black sedan waiting in the center of the intersection with a tall glass tower looming straight ahead.
